title: Rules and regulations
doc_html:
§1807.2. Rules and regulations

            The commissioner may adopt regulations, in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act, to effectuate the requirements of this Part.

            Acts 2012, No. 96, §1; Acts 2024, No. 625, §1.
doc_text:
§1807.2.  Rules and regulations
The commissioner may adopt regulations, in accordance with the Administrative
Procedure Act, to effectuate the requirements of this Part.
Acts 2012, No. 96, §1; Acts 2024, No. 625, §1.
